title: To The Handsome Mistress Grace Potter
content:
As is your name, so is your comely face
Touch'd every where with such diffused grace,
As that in all that admirable round,
There is not one least solecism found;
And as that part, so every portion else
Keeps line for line with beauty's parallels.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To The Handsome Mistress Grace Potter"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
